output.sparql:
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?partner ?coach WHERE {
  wd:Q233556 p:P1346 ?jelenaStmt .
  ?jelenaStmt ps:P1346 ?event ; pq:P1352 "2" .
  ?event wdt:P2022 wd:Q248297 .
  ?event p:P1346 ?partnerStmt .
  ?partnerStmt ps:P1346 ?partner .
  FILTER(?partner != wd:Q233556)
  .
  ?partner wdt:P1347 ?coach .
}
